message:
fix(cli,server,tools,storage): security hardening, cross-platform paths, search ordering, and LLM context optimization

Security hardening:
- cli/lib.rs: use enclosed_name() for zip extraction to prevent path
  traversal attacks (ZipSlip) instead of raw file.name()
- cli/lib.rs: read stdin as bytes then lossy-convert to handle binary
  input in guard command without panicking
- server/static_files.rs: add 100MB file size limit to prevent OOM
  when serving unexpectedly large static files
- server/tui_screens/messages.rs: add 5MB limit for inline image
  loading to prevent memory exhaustion from oversized images
- server/tui_screens/archive_browser.rs: read file preview as raw
  bytes with bounded read instead of unbounded read_to_string
- tools/build_slots.rs: write lease JSON atomically via tmp+rename
  to prevent race conditions during concurrent slot reads
- core/config.rs: write .env files atomically via tmp+rename to
  prevent partial writes/corruption during concurrent access
- storage/lib.rs: use blob_path() for streaming blob creation and
  atomic_write_bytes() for attachment storage to prevent corruption

Cross-platform path normalization:
- cli/lib.rs, cli/robot.rs: normalize backslashes to forward slashes
  in CWD-derived project paths for Windows compatibility
- server/cleanup.rs: normalize workspace paths and simplify pattern
  matching to use forward-slash-only convention
- main.rs: normalize arg0 backslashes before extracting file name
  for correct invocation detection on Windows

Search and query improvements:
- db/queries.rs: change LIKE fallback search ordering from ASC to
  DESC so newest messages appear first (matches FTS behavior)
- tools/products.rs: use .abs() on limit parameters to handle
  negative values gracefully instead of wrapping to huge usize

LLM context window optimization:
- tools/macros.rs, tools/search.rs, tools/products.rs: take the
  LAST N messages for LLM summarization instead of first N, so the
  LLM sees the most recent (and most relevant) conversation context.
  This applies to both single-project and product-level thread
  summarization, and to example message selection.

TUI rendering fixes:
- server/console.rs: use rfind('@') for URL userinfo masking to
  handle usernames containing '@' correctly
- server/console.rs, server/lib.rs: migrate Table rendering from
  Widget to StatefulWidget to match updated ftui API
- server/tui_markdown.rs: validate JSON with serde parse instead of
  just checking first character, preventing markdown links like
  [Link](url) from being misidentified as JSON

Code quality:
- db/pool.rs: reformat long assert messages and update health check
  function name to sqlite_file_is_healthy_canonical
- db/queries.rs: add clippy::too_many_lines allow for large test
- server/tui_screens/dashboard.rs: use f64::EPSILON for float
  comparison instead of direct equality
- server/tui_screens/threads.rs: use checked_sub for Instant
  arithmetic to prevent potential panic on time subtraction
- server/cleanup.rs: remove unnecessary timeout wrapper around git
  commands (git has its own timeout mechanisms)
- main.rs: make should_dispatch_to_cli_surface a const fn

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2466,6 +2466,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "ftui-style",
  "ftui-text",
  "ftui-widgets",
+ "proptest",
  "serde_json",
  "tracing",
 ]
